  as `{:kiln_ui_lint, "mix kiln.ui.lint"}`. Verified: `mix kiln.ui.lint`
  ŌåÆ OK.
- **Layer 3** ŌĆö Full Playwright scaffold at `test/e2e/` with 4-project
  matrix (desktop-chromium + mobile-safari x light + dark), specs for
  theme-toggle, all 14 routes, axe-core a11y, onboarding, inbox,

  migrates, seeds canonical fixtures (`priv/repo/seeds_e2e.exs` ŌåÆ
  `test/e2e/.fixture-ids.json`), starts phx.server with
  `KILN_SKIP_OPERATOR_READINESS=1`, waits on `/health`.

CI: new `e2e` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yml` with `needs: [check]`,
postgres service, Playwright browser cache, HTML report + traces + phx
log artifacts.

Local DX: `script/shift_left_verify.sh` extended to (3/3); `justfile`

**Not yet done:** full cold-cache `mix check` run, local Playwright

  1. `cd /Users/jon/projects/kiln && mix check` (cold Dialyzer first run ~5-10min)
  2. `cd test/e2e && npm ci && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium webkit` (~300MB; one-time)
  3. `mix kiln.e2e` locally ŌĆö confirm all 14 routes pass in the 4-project matrix, axe is clean
  4. Commit + push branch
  5. Confirm GitHub Actions `check` + `integration-smoke` + `e2e` jobs all green on the PR
</remaining_work>

<decisions_made>

- **Seeds run without `KILN_DB_ROLE` override.** Setting `kiln_owner` breaks reads of `workflow_definition_snapshots` (that's a `kiln_app`-only grant). Dev's superuser `kiln` has access to both, so `mix run priv/repo/seeds_e2e.exs` plain.
- **Playwright matrix uses 4 *projects*, not per-test param.** Config has `desktop-chromium-{light,dark}` + `mobile-safari-{light,dark}` ŌĆö better parallelism, cleaner reporting than spec-level fixtures.
- **axe blocks on `serious`+`critical` only.** Matches brand book's contrast-first posture; moderate/minor are reported but don't fail merge.
- **`mix kiln.ui.lint` uses pure BEAM string scan**, not `rg` shell-out. No runtime dep on ripgrep. Supports `# kiln-ui-lint:allow` line-level escape hatch.
- **Retired-token list is the same in Layer 1 (HEEx-rendered HTML) and Layer 2 (source scan).** Two independent gates on one list.
</decisions_made>

<blockers>
None. All work is self-contained; verification is pure execution.
</blockers>

## Required Reading (in order)

1. `.cursor/plans/Shift-left UI e2e verification-ce553935.plan.md` ŌĆö the plan, read-only
2. `test/e2e/fixtures/kiln.ts` ŌĆö fixture API (`kiln.goto`, `kiln.axeScan`, `consoleErrors` sink)
3. `priv/repo/seeds_e2e.exs` ŌĆö canonical fixture shape + `.fixture-ids.json` contract
4. `test/kiln_web/live/route_smoke_test.exs` ŌĆö in-process regression guard
5. `lib/mix/tasks/kiln/ui/lint.ex` ŌĆö token list is the source of truth; mirror into Playwright specs when adding tokens

## Critical Anti-Patterns (do NOT repeat these)

| Pattern | Description | Severity | Prevention |
|---------|-------------|----------|------------|
| Passing `KILN_DB_ROLE=kiln_owner` to `mix run priv/repo/seeds_e2e.exs` | Breaks with `permission denied for table workflow_definition_snapshots` ŌĆö `kiln_owner` owns DDL but has no DML on `kiln_app`-scoped tables | advisory | Seed script documents: "Run without `KILN_DB_ROLE`" ŌĆö let the session run as superuser `kiln` |
| Module attribute syntax (`@foo`) at top-level of a `.exs` script | Compiles in `.ex` modules only; at script level use plain `binding = value` | advisory | `priv/repo/seeds_e2e.exs` uses plain bindings |
| `<.form for={@changeset}>` / accessing changeset in template | Existing Phoenix v1.8 anti-pattern ŌĆö always `to_form/2` in LiveView, `@form[:field]` in template | advisory | Pre-existing project convention, not introduced here |

## Infrastructure State

- **Postgres (dev):** running on `localhost:5432` via `docker compose up -d db`. Seeds successful.
- **`test/e2e/.fixture-ids.json`:** exists locally from verification run. Gitignored ŌĆö regenerated by any `mix run priv/repo/seeds_e2e.exs` / `bash script/e2e_boot.sh` / `mix kiln.e2e` invocation.
- **`test/e2e/node_modules/`:** NOT yet installed locally. First run of `mix kiln.e2e` will handle via `npm ci` + `npx playwright install`.
- **Pre-existing working-tree mods** from the prior Phase reskin session (`lib/kiln_web/**`, `assets/css/app.css`, etc.) are still unstaged ŌĆö those belong to earlier work, not this plan.

<context>
The reskin is complete and the user wants zero-human-verification before merge. Three layers were chosen:

- Layer 1 (LV in-process) ŌĆö fastest feedback, runs on every `mix check` (<1s).
- Layer 2 (source lint) ŌĆö catches template-level regressions Layer 1's route set might miss.
- Layer 3 (Playwright) ŌĆö real browser, real a11y, real theme persistence, full matrix. Heavier but runs on CI and gated locally by `SHIFT_LEFT_SKIP_E2E`.

All plan-file to-dos are complete. Only the final end-to-end verification remains, which requires node/browser install on first run.
</context>
